<!--
感谢你的贡献！/ Thanks for your contribution!

提交 PR 前，请阅读 [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) 或 [CONTRIBUTING.zh-CN.md](../CONTRIBUTING.zh-CN.md)。
Before submitting, please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
-->

## 变更类型 / Type of Change

<!-- 在对应选项前打 [x] / Check the relevant option(s) -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug 修复 / Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] 📝 文档更新 / Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ 代码重构 / Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] 🎨 样式调整 / Style / UI change
- [ ] ⚡ 性能优化 / Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 构建配置 / Build / CI configuration
- [ ] 🧪 测试相关 / Test related
- [ ] 💥 破坏性变更 / Breaking change

## 变更描述 / Description

<!--
简要描述本次变更的内容和动机。
Briefly describe what was changed and why.
-->

## 关联 Issue / Related Issue

<!--
若解决了某个 Issue，请使用 "Closes #xxx" / "Fixes #xxx" 关联。
Use "Closes #xxx" or "Fixes #xxx" to link related issues.
-->

Closes #

## 影响范围 / Affected Packages

- [ ] `@eternalheart/file-preview-core`
- [ ] `@eternalheart/react-file-preview`
- [ ] `@eternalheart/vue-file-preview`
- [ ] 文档 / Docs
- [ ] 示例 / Examples

## 测试情况 / Testing

- [ ] 已通过本地构建（`pnpm build:lib`）/ Local build passes
- [ ] 已通过 lint 检查（`pnpm lint`）/ Lint passes
- [ ] 已手动验证 React 端 / Manually tested React side
- [ ] 已手动验证 Vue 端 / Manually tested Vue side
- [ ] 新增/变更涉及文件类型支持时，已在 React 和 Vue 双端同步实现 / If touching file type support, both React and Vue sides are updated in sync

### 测试方法 / How to Test

<!--
描述他人复现你测试的步骤。
Describe the steps others can take to reproduce your testing.
-->

## 截图 / 录屏 / Screenshots

<!--
如涉及 UI 变更，请附上截图或 GIF。
For UI changes, please attach screenshots or a short recording.
-->

## 破坏性变更说明 / Breaking Changes

<!--
若包含破坏性变更，请详细说明影响范围和迁移指南。
If this PR introduces breaking changes, describe the impact and migration path.
-->

## 检查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 代码遵循项目 ESLint 规范 / Code follows the project's ESLint rules
- [ ] 提交信息遵循 [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) / Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] 已更新相关文档（如有必要）/ Documentation has been updated where applicable
- [ ] 自测通过，不引入回归 / Self-tested, no regressions introduced
- [ ] 已阅读 [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) / I have read the CONTRIBUTING guide

## 补充说明 / Additional Notes

<!--
其他想让 Reviewer 知道的内容。
Anything else reviewers should know.
-->
